versions.version_description: This version includes a more chords to highlight the melody more and add more dramatic color to the song.
Ab Version in the realm of Brenda Lee Original w/ a Partridge Family Twist for Christmas Show by Misti Koop. Tab by Joseph Vincent McCauley.
Easy Tab with only three chords (tonic, subdominant, dominant).
Fairly simplified but still difficult version that is easy to play with the begging ridd.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Found no perfect version of the song. So hear here a updated version.

recommended.song_name: Santa Claus Is Coming To Town

content:
ROCKIN' AROUND THE CHRISTMAS TREE
(J. Marks)

[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                         [ch]D[/ch]
Rocking around the Christmas tree at the Christmas party hop[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                                       [ch]G[/ch]
Mistletoe hung where you can see every couple tries to stop[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                           [ch]D[/ch]
Rocking around the Christmas tree, let the Christmas spirit ring[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                                        [ch]G[/ch]
Later we'll have some pumpkin pie and we'll do some caroling[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
You will get a sentimental feeling when you hear[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Voices singing let's be jolly, deck the halls with boughs of holly[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                          [ch]D[/ch]
Rocking around the Christmas tree, have a happy holiday[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                                 [ch]G[/ch]
Everyone dancing merrily in the new old-fashioned way[/tab]

[Solo]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
You will get a sentimental feeling when you hear[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Voices singing let's be jolly, deck the halls with boughs of holly[/tab]

[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                          [ch]D[/ch]
Rocking around the Christmas tree, have a happy holiday[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                                 [ch]G[/ch]
Everyone dancing merrily in the new old-fashioned way[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Everyone dancing merrily in the new   old - fa - shioned way[/tab]
